SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.core.engine

Class OrasakaCoreConfiguration

java.lang.Object
com.orasaka.core.engine.OrasakaCoreConfiguration
@Configuration public class OrasakaCoreConfiguration extends Object
Spring Boot @Configuration class for the orasaka-core module.

Defines and assembles all core engine beans: AI model maps (chat, image, embedding, speech), configuration properties (CoreProperties, FeaturesProperties), the GraphEngine, and the AdminRegistry.

Model instantiation is delegated to ModelFactory, with a special case for LocalAI image models that use the OpenAI-compatible API.

Since:
1.0.0
See Also:

  • CoreProperties

      public OrasakaCoreConfiguration()

  • Method Details

    • chatModels

      @Bean public Map<String,org.springframework.ai.chat.model.ChatModel> chatModels(CoreProperties properties)
      Creates the provider → ChatModel map bean.
      Parameters:
      properties - Core configuration with provider overrides.
      Returns:
      Immutable map of provider name → ChatModel.

    • embeddingModels

      @Bean public Map<String,org.springframework.ai.embedding.EmbeddingModel> embeddingModels(CoreProperties properties)
      Creates the provider → EmbeddingModel map bean.
      Parameters:
      properties - Core configuration with provider overrides.
      Returns:
      Immutable map of provider name → EmbeddingModel.

    • imageModels

      @Bean public Map<String,org.springframework.ai.image.ImageModel> imageModels(CoreProperties properties)
      Creates the provider → ImageModel map bean, including LocalAI fallback.

      If a localai provider is configured, it is registered as both "localai" and "ollama" to enable transparent fallback.

      Parameters:
      properties - Core configuration with provider overrides.
      Returns:
      Mutable map of provider name → ImageModel.

    • speechModels

      @Bean public Map<String,org.springframework.ai.audio.tts.TextToSpeechModel> speechModels()
      Creates an empty provider → TextToSpeechModel map bean.

      TTS models are currently not auto-discovered; this provides a placeholder for manual or conditional registration.

      Returns:
      An empty mutable map.

    • coreProperties

      @Bean public CoreProperties coreProperties(org.springframework.core.env.Environment env)
      Binds the orasaka.core configuration prefix to a CoreProperties record.
      Parameters:
      env - The Spring environment for property resolution.
      Returns:
      The bound CoreProperties instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the configuration prefix is missing or binding fails.

    • featuresProperties

      @Bean public com.orasaka.core.engine.FeaturesProperties featuresProperties(org.springframework.core.env.Environment env)
      Binds the orasaka configuration prefix to FeaturesProperties.
      Parameters:
      env - The Spring environment for property resolution.
      Returns:
      The bound features properties, or a default empty instance.

    • adminRegistry

      @Bean public AdminRegistry adminRegistry()
      Creates the singleton AdminRegistry for runtime capability lock management.
      Returns:
      A new thread-safe admin registry instance.

    • graphEngine

      @Bean public GraphEngine graphEngine(com.orasaka.core.engine.FeaturesProperties featuresProperties, AdminRegistry adminRegistry)
      Creates the GraphEngine bean for SDUI Operation Graph compilation.
      Parameters:
      featuresProperties - Static feature capability blueprints.
      adminRegistry - Runtime lock registry for dynamic capability control.
      Returns:
      A configured graph engine instance.
